name: OnSecurityLocalPDUValidated
title: OnSecurityLocalPDUValidated
syntax: void OnSecurityLocalPDUValidated(char pduName[], dword dataId, byte payload[], dword payloadLength, qword authInfoHigh, qword authInfo, dword authInfoBitLength, qword freshness, dword freshnessBitLength, dword freshnessValueId, dword verificationResult)
description: This callback handler is called, when a node received a secured PDU and verified the authentication information.
Apart from the verification result, all values which have been used for verification can be analyzed.
